SEARCH
Package fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model

Class AnalysisSettings

java.lang.Object
fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.AnalysisSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Cloneable
public class AnalysisSettings extends Object implements Cloneable
A class containing the user's current image processing settings for the plugin.
